name: CLX - MGA Insurance Demo Data Seed v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. MARY_MASTER_TOKEN. Seeds synthetic demo data: 50 clients + 10 advisors + 100 policies + 30 reviews. All rows tagged demo_mode=true so they can be cleared via demo-reset without touching real data.

parameters.jsCode:
const built = $('Build Seeds').first().json;
return { json: { ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', leads_seeded: (built.leads || []).length, advisors_seeded: built.advisors_count, policies_seeded: built.policies_count, reviews_seeded: built.reviews_count, scenarios: built.scenarios, note: 'Advisors / policies / reviews stubs not yet wired — see demo guide for the manual SQL inserts.' } };
